text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists exactly as cited. It was published in the *American Economic Review*, volume 108, issue 1, January 2018 (pages 1–48), authored by Dirk Bergemann, Alessandro Bonatti, and Alex Smolin. The automated checkers' "author count mismatch" and "year mismatch" flags are incorrect — all three authors and the 2018 publication year are confirmed by the AEA website, SSRN, MIT DSpace, and multiple other sources.
LINK: https://www.aeaweb.org/articles?id=10.1257/aer.20161079
